description: A journalist from a local newspaper requests a press pass for an upcoming game.

nodes.task_description: Ask the journalist for their credentials and publication details.
Verify the legitimacy of the journalist and their publication.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the publication is a known media outlet.

nodes.task_description: Approve the request and add the journalist's name to the press list for the event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds the journalist to the approved media list.

nodes.task_description: Inform the journalist that their credential will be available for pickup at the press entrance on the day of the event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a confirmation email with instructions.
